ns1:SendMessage.ns1:request: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <TransferMessage xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"> <Header><EnforcementAgentType><EnforcementAgentRegNum>892</EnforcementAgentRegNum><EnforcementAgentName>Христо Василев Георгиев</EnforcementAgentName></EnforcementAgentType><TransferDate>2024-08-23T15:58:02+03:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>{340c324d-3176-491d-a566-3f677ca0797e}</TransferGUID></Header><Body><TransferData><IncomingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><OutgoingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><CasesReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><ActionReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2024-08-17T00:00:01+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>1</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20228920400050</CaseNum><CaseDate>2022-01-20</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>Султанка Иванова Николова</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>С-е №8879 не е връчено след многократни посещения дл не живее в Б-я</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2024-08-17T00:00:01+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>2</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20228920400612</CaseNum><CaseDate>2022-05-18</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>Борислав Володиев Дамянов</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>С-е №8857 не е връчено, длъжника не живее на адрес</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails></ActionReg></TransferData></Body></TransferMessage>
